description_long: This is a freestanding, double-sided blackboard with a sturdy wooden frame and legs, designed in an A-frame or sandwich board style. The frame is made of medium-toned wood, giving it a warm, rustic appearance, and the blackboard surface is matte and dark, suitable for chalk writing. The legs are angled outward for stability, and a metal support bar connects the two sides near the top, ensuring the structure remains open and secure. Both sides of the board are usable, making it ideal for placement on sidewalks or in front of businesses for displaying messages or menus. The overall construction appears robust, with no visible signs of damage or excessive wear. There are no visible trays or chalk holders attached to the frame.
description: A freestanding, double-sided blackboard with a wooden A-frame and matte black writing surfaces, ideal for sidewalk or storefront use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full blackboard writing surface framed by medium-toned wood.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the A-frame structure and metal support bar connecting the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the second blackboard surface, identical to the front, with the same wooden frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the A-frame stance and metal support bar.
attribute_frame_design: medium-thickness wooden frame, natural brown color, rectangular profile, no decorative features
